verdict: NULL confirmed — no exploitable first-order multiplicative-character bias
conclusion: Decode is ~uniform over {0..15}; index 0 is NOT special (the spec's mu(0)=1/p is inconsistent with the shipped verifier). The 'never zero position 0' heuristic is wrong for this instance. Density success-rate baseline is 2^-48 (paper §6). No attack lever found at the tested rounds.
